response.justification: While the candidate has strong general software engineering experience and diverse technical exposure, there is no evidence of professional C++ development on Windows, SQL Server/Oracle database work, or any domain experience in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking — all of which are mandatory for this role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong track record in CI/CD, testing practices, and developer tooling
Proven ability to lead open-source projects and contribute to complex systems
concerns: No demonstrated professional C++ experience on Windows platform
No evidence of SQL Server or Oracle usage in financial domain contexts
Lacks any exposure to fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking systems
